text_block_list.text: "Ship of gold, resting beneath the waves..."

"Now is the time to unleash your true potential.
Make for the uncharted territory before you..."
"Go. Go to the radiant land yet untrodden..."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Urgh... What was that voice just now?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Someone with a whacked out god complex? Or
maybe it was another Golshi that awoke in me...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What's this about "uncharted territory," anyway?
Uncharted territory... Uncharted... Ah.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ohhh. I've got it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: This whole message just means "come to Eden"!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first race of the Classics, the Satsuki Sho, is
right around the corner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I need to get Gold Ship training for it ASAP!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: OHHH YEEEAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If they need an Umamusume strong enough to
make it to Eden, then I'll just have to transcend
mortality!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I... AM... GOD SHIP GOLSHI!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to call after her, but Gold Ship is already
gone...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I search around the academy frantically for her,
and finally...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CRASH!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! Who? Who dares bar the path of
God Ship Golshi?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hello there, Golshi. You sure are a ball of energy
today.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Creek. Of course! I was wondering what I
could have hit that would be so soft.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But enough small talk—let me through! Or I shall
force my way through with divine authority!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Eat this! Axe Bomber Avalanche!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thwomp!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what an interesting move! That was so good,
Golshi! You're very strong.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Impossible! You don't have a scratch on you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Very well... Let's see if you can handle this!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hundred-Strike Elbow Smash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: PA-POW!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Why, look at that! Goodness, you are so talented!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, c'mon... That didn't work either?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You've left me no choice. Looks like I have to use
my secret technique...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Divine Deliverance: Radiant Blade of Justice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... How'd you like them apples?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you must've practiced a lot for that. What
a hard worker you are!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: H-how is this possible?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I see the truth now... All of creation is born of
mothers...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What is a mere god to a mommy? I never stood a
chance...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her determination to become an
Umamusume powerful enough to find Eden, it's
not enough...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship vs. Super Creek: defeat! (To be
continued...)
